reasoning: This is a straightforward rear-end collision claim on an active policy (POL001, valid through 2026-12-31) that covers collision damage. The incident is well-documented with a police report and two witness statements, plus photographic evidence. The estimated repair amount of 3,500 EUR is well below the 10,000 EUR fast-track threshold and within the 80,000 EUR coverage limit. After applying the 1,000 EUR deductible, the recommended payout is 2,500 EUR. The fraud score is 0.0 with no indicators flagged. The customer has a clean history with only one prior claim in 2023 and no fraud flags. All escalation rule thresholds are comfortably below their limits.
